summary:
GEOGRAPHICAL READ
India activity concentrates in Colo (269 signals) and Build (18 signals), with Power (9) and Compute (3) showing secondary presence. Top states by entity: Tamil Nadu (Sify), Delhi (Nxtra, Oracle), Maharashtra (NTT, Tata, Reliance, AdaniConnex), Telangana (Yotta), Karnataka (Google). GCC movements: UAE leads in Colo (5) and Build (8); Saudi Arabia shows strongest Power (3) and Build (4) signals; Kuwait has Compute (3) and Colo (1).

POLICY READ
India policy tailwinds: 3 regulation notices (bank/demat account attachments, AP Nos. 15504-15509 of 2026) signal heightened financial scrutiny — potential hook for TAG government-affairs on compliance advisory for data-center operators. No India legislation or analysis signals. GCC policy: Saudi Arabia has 15 regulation items (e.g., cloud growth, AI innovation, Hajj data-center shifts) but no direct India push; Kuwait has 1 regulation (trading suspensions). No GCC policy currently drives India entry.

COMMERCIAL READ
India layers: Colo dominant (252 signals), Build (1), others zero. GCC layers: UAE leads in Compute (2) and Colo (1); Saudi Arabia shows Power (1 in Qatar, 1 in SA) and Build (1). India operators with momentum: Sify (top mover, 8 new signals, India partnership play), Nxtra (8 new signals, India partnership), CtrlS (8 new signals, India entity but Watch play), NTT (5 new signals, India entity, Watch play). Whitespace GCC operators with no India entity: center3 (GCC; SA), Khazna (GCC), Ooredoo (GCC) — all prime India market-entry targets.

RANKED INDIA OPPORTUNITIES
1. center3; why-now: GCC active (SA focus) with 8 new signals and recent news 2026-04-05; cross-signal: active in GCC, no India entity (whitespace target); TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: 0223d872de10, 79fd79d26e0a, c91f9bae49fe, b8ff3f8e9923, 6ea4c9dde3eb, 94c55c554538, 466ef9dd1e65, 8eaa1b1ce927
2. Khazna; why-now: GCC active with score 29.1 (whitespace); cross-signal: active in GCC, no India entity; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: not in data (whitespace list only provides name/score/geo)
3. Ooredoo; why-now: GCC active with score 25.4 (whitespace); cross-signal: active in GCC, no India entity; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: not in data (whitespace list only provides name/score/geo)
4. Sify; why-now: 8 new signals, 1 ≤7d, top mover, India partnership play (T1); cross-signal: active India entity (U72200TN1995PLC050809) with rising momentum; TAG play: India partnership; evidence: 341f0dc0b422, 0001554855-26-001437, 0001554855-26-000600, 0001575872-26-000022, 0001575872-25-000666, 0001575872-25-000646, 49dd2464fa3e, 594d534e0c59
